{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Soulsever
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]] used [[Soulsever]] to strike down [[Min Shuei]]'s technique.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Soulsever]] is a weapon used by [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
